title: Feur Statue
description: A mod that adds mob and monsters statues
body:
![Feur Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/045bd3211159ef8b67f2a8147e7e27e428068c8c.png)

A small mod that adds monster statues
You can create statues by creating the Block Statue (Stone, gunpowder and iron nugget) and the choice is made with the stonecutter.
There are a total of more than **_40 statues available_** at the moment and more in the future
